steps.t: The broken mirror trap can be found at Shalakibal, in eastern Máttugard. You should find and assess the broken mirror trap.
Parts for the mirror trap can be found scattered throughout Shalakibal. You should search for parts to fix the broken mirror trap.
The broken mirror trap can be found at Shalakibal, in eastern Máttugard. You should attempt to repair the broken mirror trap.
